arguments.code: from zephyra_outfitters.shipping import shipping_cost; region = order['region']; cost = 5 if 'free' in str(order).lower() else shipping_cost(region); total_cost = sum(item['quantity'] * item['unit_price'] for item in order['line_items']) + cost; total_cost

from zephyra_outfitters.shipping import shipping_cost; region = order['region']; cost = 5 if 'free' in str(order).lower() else shipping_cost(region); total_cost = sum(item['quantity'] * item['unit_price'] for item in order['line_items']) + cost; total_cost

results.content:
Zephyra Outfitters FAQ.
We ship to five regions: Ontario, Quebec, Prairie, Atlantic, Pacific. Delivery timelines and fees vary by region; see the regional shipping documents. Return windows vary by product category; see the category return policies. Current prices and stock are available only in the product catalog.

Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — backpacks.
Customers may return backpacks within 21 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — jackets.
Customers may return jackets within 30 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.
